title: chore(deps-dev): bump fastify from 5.6.2 to 5.7.3

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: [Aikido] Fix 8 security issues in systeminformation, fastify, pino and 3 more

summary: Dependabot bump of fastify from 5.6.2 to 5.7.3. This is a security update: v5.7.3 fixes CVE-2026-25224 (GHSA-mrq3-vjjr-p77c) and v5.7.2 adds stricter content-type header parsing per RFC 9110. Changes span 3 files: server-adapters/fastify/package.json, workflows/inngest/package.json, and pnpm-lock.yaml. The lockfile diff is large due to vitest resolution string normalization but the actual dependency change is minimal.
maintainerNotes: Security fix (CVE-2026-25224) makes this higher priority than a typical dep bump. However, the PR has merge conflicts (CONFLICTING state) and CI is broadly failing — build, lint, and most test suites fail. The failures appear to be from lockfile drift against main rather than a fastify incompatibility. PR #13424 (Aikido) also targets fastify among other security fixes. A maintainer should either: (1) rebase this PR to resolve conflicts and re-run CI, or (2) address the fastify bump through PR #13424 or a manual update and close this one.
